_comment: Canonical published numbers for ellip2 — the SINGLE machine-readable source of truth. README.md and RESULTS.md are asserted against these strings by tests/test_published_numbers.py (run in the CI gate). Do not hand-edit a number in the docs without changing it here first; the build fails on drift. Values are the exact rendered substrings that must appear verbatim in the listed docs.

facts.desc: Detection headline: tuned border model, robust mean PR-AUC across 5 stratified splits (best-of-3 val selection).
Detection: best single-split test PR-AUC for the tuned border model.
Baseline: GLASS PR-AUC (RevTrack Table 1, GPU + node features).
Baseline: RevClassify_DS SOTA PR-AUC (border Deep Sets).
Per-cluster suspicion scorer (drives discovery): weak test-member PR-AUC.
Discovery: held-out-recovery lift over the 0.0001 random baseline.
Discovery: held-out-recovery recall (5 of 276 test-suspicious subgraphs re-found).
Discovery: candidate subgraphs surfaced from the background (top-500 by cluster score).
Suspicious base rate over the labeled subgraphs.
